raw_consumer_statement:
back in XX/XX/year> i purchased with my American express credit card a refrigerator that cost about {$230.00}, the fridge was sent to the wrong address, i did call to find out why i did not get the fridge, i was told it was sent to a different address, i asked to refund me the money and send me a new fridge, the person i spoke to sounded like he was in a foreign country like XXXX, he said in order to get the new fridge i will have to pay it first and i will get the refund later when they pick up the fridge from the wrong location, i agreed and we proceeded with the new order which was delivered to me at last. 
when i received my bill i seen XXXX of the same charges but no refund, i contacted XXXX about that, they said they will send me an email with results, the email came stating that i should contact my credit card company because they were unsuccessful with that and that i should tell my credit card company to deal with that, which i did, they denied my credit card company even when i showed the emails to them, i did a second dispute, the credit card company said that the XXXX is responding that i never asked for the refund and closed the case without telling me, i had to find out through a message online on my account. i believe my credit card company is not doing their job correctly and that is where you came in, i am not sure where to go from here. 
thank you for your help and look forward to hear back from you soon XXXX XXXX
